description_long: A young child stands upright with both arms relaxed at their sides, wearing a short-sleeve t-shirt adorned with colorful cartoon graphics on the front. The child is also dressed in knee-length shorts and slip-on shoes. The t-shirt fits loosely, and the shorts have a comfortable, casual cut. The child's hair is short and neatly trimmed, with a visible parting and a slightly darker patch on the crown. The footwear appears to be soft and easy to wear, suitable for outdoor play or walking. No accessories such as hats, bags, or jewelry are visible, and the child is not carrying any objects.
description: A young child stands upright in casual clothing, featuring a graphic t-shirt, shorts, and slip-on shoes. The child has short, neatly trimmed hair and a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's face, graphic t-shirt, shorts, and both arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the child's face, the loose fit of the t-shirt, and the side of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, plain back of the t-shirt, and the back of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the child's profile, t-shirt, shorts, and shoes from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve t-shirt with cartoon graphics and knee-length shorts
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a visible parting
